md.title: Desktop(Default)
md.details: Styles added here will be applied globally.

tablet.title: Tablet
tablet.details: Styles added here will apply at 991px and below.

mobileLandscape.title: Mobile Landscape
mobileLandscape.details: Styles added here will apply at 767px and below.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.details: Styles added here will apply at 575px and below.
